title: 12 Pcs Artificial Christmas Glitter Leaves Picks, Christmas Glitter Pine Needles Branches Spray Glitter Frosted Branches for DIY Accessories Christmas Floral Decorations Wreath Garland (Champagne)
features: Package: You will get 12 Christmas leaves with a layer of glittering golden powder on the surface. Suitable for adding festive atmosphere.
Size: The length of each leaf is 26.5 cm. Artificial leaf is lifelike, suitable for any home decoration and indoor outdoor decoration.
Material: The false leaves are made of PE, light weight, non-toxic and durable, and can be used multiple times, not easy to damage.
Design: It is manufactured by imitating the shape of the ferns. This is why it is still beautiful although it is made by plastic. The leaves are full of flash powder, make it more shining.

Application: Flash fern leaf can be used to make flower rings and Christmas trees decoration. It can also be used as a photography prop. In the meanwhile, suitable for clipboards, pocket clipboards, photo frames, etc.
description: Product description 12 pcs Christmas Glitter Artificial Leaf Picks, Christmas Glitter Pine Needles, Glitter Frosted Branches for DIY Accessories, Christmas Floral Decorations, Garland Safety Warning This artificial plant is made of plastic and is non-toxic. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets to avoid any potential misuse or damage.
